author: Kshitiz
name: 11L MLP3x + Int6 PTQ + Muon Momentum 0.99
blurb: SP-4096 tokenizer with 11 transformer layers, 3x MLP expansion, int6 post-training quantization (levels=31) with zstd-22 compression, Muon momentum 0.99, decoupled weight decay 0.02, fp16 embedding passthrough, stride-64 sliding window eval.
